hero.headline: Engineered Different. On Purpose.
hero.paragraph1: SaaSless Forge is a custom software studio built on a fundamental belief: businesses deserve infrastructure that's engineered for them — not rented from someone else. We watched too many companies get trapped in cookie-cutter SaaS tools that sort of worked, kind of fit, and definitely cost too much. So we started forging the alternative.
hero.paragraph2: Every project begins with a conversation, not a sales pitch. We listen first, architect carefully, and build fast — because your time is as valuable as your budget.

items.title: No Bloat
items.description: We engineer exactly what you need — nothing more, nothing less. Every feature earns its place in the system.

items.title: No Black Box
items.description: You own your code, your data, and your infrastructure. Full transparency, full control, always.

items.title: No Assembly Line
items.description: Every project gets direct attention from senior engineers. No juniors, no handoffs, no layers between you and the work.

items.title: No Nonsense
items.description: Fixed pricing, clear timelines, weekly demos of working software. We respect your time and your budget.

saaslessMeaning.headline: Why "SaaSless"?
saaslessMeaning.description: SaaS changed the world — but it also created a world of monthly fees, vendor lock-in, and one-size-fits-all solutions. "SaaSless" means taking back ownership. It means custom infrastructure that you pay for once and own forever. No per-seat pricing. No feature gates. No begging for integrations. Just software engineered to fit your business like a glove.
